series_metadata.series_description: Form No. ADM-6301 is used for the purpose of updating payroll in a two week period and reflects any changes in code, hours, sequence number, social security, work location, accounting information, leave name, rate, retirement, taxes deducted, etc. Additi

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records in operating area through the current fiscal year plus one fiscal year, then retire to agency record storage area until one year after the release of the State Auditor's report, then destroy., Paper: Shred
